entries.summary: Phase 7 completed production polish: Settings page with inference mode/server config/model selection/theme/storage, cross-browser compatibility detection with feature checks and guidance for Chrome/Edge/Firefox/Safari, and reusable UI polish components (ErrorBoundary, LoadingSkeleton, EmptyState). 3 tasks, 85+ tests, 7 coder revisions. Fixed critical InferenceModeProvider isolation bug (moved to App.tsx root).
top_rejection_reasons: Isolated context providers per page instead of app root
lessons_learned: const x = typeof x !== 'undefined' is a TDZ self-reference — always use a different local name like hasX
InferenceModeProvider must be at App.tsx root, not per-page — ephemeral state (isServerConnected, modeError) resets on navigation otherwise
Theme 'system' option needs explicit localStorage.removeItem to clear stored preference so media query takes over
All button elements must have type='button' explicitly — default is 'submit' which causes form submission inside forms
Server URL should be persisted on blur, not on every keystroke
